description: Length-matched V2 facts for bio-AI parallels domain. Fixes: bio09 overclaim toned down, bio15 distractor fixed, all lengths matched.

facts.context: E. coli chemotaxis (run-and-tumble with temporal gradient sensing) is computationally equivalent to:
facts.truth: stochastic gradient descent with momentum via sensory adaptation
distractors: deterministic hill climbing without any stochastic noise component
pure random walk with zero directional bias in any direction
exhaustive grid search over the full concentration field space

facts.context: Bacterial chemotaxis achieves perfect adaptation (return to prestimulus baseline) through:
facts.truth: integral feedback where methylation integrates signal over time
distractors: proportional feedback where receptor sensitivity scales directly
derivative feedback where rate of concentration change is sensed
feedforward prediction where future concentrations are estimated

facts.context: Schultz (1997) showed that midbrain dopamine neuron firing encodes:
facts.truth: temporal difference prediction error: delta = r + gamma*V(s') - V(s)
distractors: absolute magnitude of reward received at the current time step
cumulative total discounted return computed from the episode start
policy gradient signal weighted by the estimated advantage function

facts.context: The basal ganglia direct pathway (D1 striatal neurons to GPi inhibition to thalamus) implements:
facts.truth: the actor's Go signal that facilitates execution of selected actions
distractors: the critic's value estimate for evaluating the current brain state
the replay buffer that stores past state-action transition memories
the exploration noise source that adds randomness to action choice

facts.context: C. elegans switches between local area-restricted search and long-range roaming. This maps to:
facts.truth: exploration-exploitation tradeoff as in epsilon-greedy or UCB strategies
distractors: pure exploitation strategy with zero exploratory movement component
full model-based planning with complete internal environment simulation
imitation learning from trajectories observed in nearby conspecifics

facts.context: Levy flight foraging patterns (heavy-tailed step distributions) are optimal when:
facts.truth: targets are sparse and randomly distributed in destructive foraging
distractors: targets are densely clustered in known locations across the space
the environment has absolutely no spatial structure whatsoever
the forager possesses a complete map of all target coordinates

facts.context: Hebbian learning (delta-w proportional to pre times post) differs from backpropagation primarily because:
facts.truth: Hebbian uses only local pre/post information with no global error signal
distractors: Hebbian learning requires labeled supervised training data per synapse
Hebbian computes exact gradients of a global network loss function
Hebbian requires full network topology knowledge to update each weight

facts.context: Hippocampal grid cells and place cells solve the same computational problem as:
facts.truth: SLAM: simultaneous localization and mapping from noisy sensor inputs
distractors: convex optimization over a known and fixed cost landscape function
batch supervised classification of discrete spatial category labels
lossless compression of continuous visual input streams into memory

facts.context: Bacterial quorum sensing (collective behavioral switch at signal threshold) is analogous to:
facts.truth: threshold-based distributed consensus requiring a critical quorum of signals
distractors: centralized master-slave replication coordinated by a single leader node
fully synchronous lockstep execution protocol across all participants
client-server request-response architecture with guaranteed total ordering

facts.context: The cerebellum's forward model of body dynamics is computationally equivalent to:
facts.truth: model predictive control: predicting outcomes to plan smooth motor actions
distractors: purely reactive proportional-derivative feedback without any prediction
tabular Q-learning with discrete state-action pairs stored in a table
genetic algorithm search over large populations of motor program plans

facts.context: Ant pheromone trail optimization converges to short paths because:
facts.truth: shorter paths get reinforced faster through positive feedback via stigmergy
distractors: each individual ant explicitly computes shortest path graph algorithms
pheromone evaporation occurs slower on paths that are geometrically longer
every ant carries a detailed internal map of the full explored territory

facts.context: Synaptic eligibility traces in neuroscience solve the same problem as:
facts.truth: temporal credit assignment: bridging the delay between action and reward
distractors: spatial credit assignment: distributing error across parallel layer paths
input normalization: stabilizing gradient magnitudes during weight updates
weight regularization: preventing catastrophic forgetting of past learning

facts.context: The C. elegans escape response (reversal plus omega turn triggered by harsh touch) maps to:
facts.truth: interrupt-driven reactive architecture where stimulus triggers fixed action pattern
distractors: deliberative planning architecture with multi-step lookahead tree search
model-free policy gradient optimization computed over many escape routes
hierarchical reinforcement learning with explicit subgoal decomposition steps

facts.context: The drift-diffusion model of perceptual decision-making is mathematically equivalent to:
facts.truth: sequential probability ratio test (SPRT): optimal sequential hypothesis testing
distractors: maximum likelihood estimation computed from a fixed single sample batch
Bayesian model comparison with exhaustive enumeration of all prior models
kernel density estimation applied over the observed stimulus feature space

facts.context: When evolution and gradient descent converge on the same solution (e.g., dopamine=TD error), this suggests:
facts.truth: fundamental computational constraints where both found the same optimum independently
distractors: pure coincidence with no deeper computational or mathematical explanation
AI researchers deliberately reverse-engineered and copied the biological design
the biological solution is consistently suboptimal relative to engineered systems

facts.context: Swarm consensus via neighbor averaging converges to the population mean because:
facts.truth: iterated averaging on a connected graph contracts toward the dominant eigenvector
distractors: each individual agent independently computes the exact global mean directly
a single central coordinator broadcasts the correct answer to all agents
agents randomly generate values and continue until they all happen to match
